name: rangersim
description: Browser 6DOF car physics sim (Three.js). Runtime is bundled by Vite (PERF-04/PERF-20.5) — three + simplex-noise resolve from node_modules (byte-identical to the retired CDN importmap pin). `npm run dev` serves on :8000; `npm run build` emits dist/ for the GitHub Actions Pages deploy. The test/*.mjs gates are pure-node and import 'three'/'simplex-noise' directly — they do NOT go through Vite.
